---
title: "FLORA Checks"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

## Load Converter

```{r load-converter}
source("flora_converter.R")
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
data <- csv_to_flora_json("flora.csv")
df <- flora_json_to_df(data)

head(df)
summary(df)
```

## Check Duplicate Original DOIs

```{r check-duplicate-dois}
check <- df |>
  group_by(doi_o) |>
  filter(n() > 1) |>
  select(doi_o, doi_r, apa_ref_r) |>
  ungroup()

View(check)

write.csv(check, "check.csv")
```

## Check Missing APA References

```{r check-missing-apa-references}
narefs <- df |>
  filter(is.na(apa_ref_r))

View(narefs)

print(narefs$doi_o)
```
